feed.title: Flarecrawl Releases
feed.subtitle: Release notes for the Flarecrawl scraping toolkit

entry.title: v0.26.0 — Hard-target scraping stack
entry.summary: Stealth TLS fingerprinting, JA3/JA4 rotation, human-like interaction via CDP.
entry.content: Hard-target scraping now supported via curl-impersonate and CDP humanisation.

entry.title: v0.22.0 — Secure credential storage
entry.summary: OS keychain integration via the keyring library.
